Items.Title: Curacao hero steals show, Saka and Rice injury latest, Bielsa rages – World Cup round-up
Items.Description: Our latest World Cup round up includes England injury updates and the Curacao hero that was crucial to their historic point against Ecuador.
Items.Author: Kieran Horn

Items.Title: Meet the record-equalling keeper who helped Curacao make history
Items.Description: Curacao's Eloy Room makes a record-equalling 15 saves to help his tiny island nation to a first World Cup point against Ecuador.

Items.Title: Impenetrable Room inspires Curacao to first World Cup point
Items.Description: Curacao goalkeeper Eloy Room equals the record for most saves in a World Cup match, as Dick Advocaat's side earn their first ever point in the tournament with a 0-0 draw against Ecuador at the Kansas City Stadium.
